patch.value: history-redact.ts (~120 lines) and history-repair.ts (~70 lines) repeat the same read-before-lock -> ownership_enforcement -> acquireLock -> re-read under lock -> drift detection -> execute -> restore-on-error -> release pattern. Extract into src/core/history/history-rewrite.ts as executeHistoryRewriteUnderLock helper. Per pm-3cbk decision: cover the new module 100% and add to vitest.config.ts include (small cohesive module, so include+cover instead of allowlist).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implementation 2026-05-26 on branch dedup-history-rewrite-and-calendar-positional-recovery. Extracted src/core/history/history-rewrite.ts (96 LOC, public API: checkHistoryRewriteOwnership(params)->string[] and verifyHistoryRewriteNoDrift(params)->{historyRawUnderLock, locatedUnderLock, loadedItemUnderLock}). Refactored history-redact.ts (668 -> 652 LOC) and history-repair.ts (264 -> 248 LOC) to use the helpers (removed 32 duplicated lines of ownership check + drift re-read + CONFLICT messages). Pruned now-unused imports (resolveGovernanceKnobs from redact, locateItem from repair). Added file to vitest.config.ts include list and shipped tests/unit/history-rewrite.spec.ts with 12 tests covering: null/matching/whitespace assignees, strict/warn/none enforcement, --force override, matching+drifted history+drifted item, and missing-item paths. Full coverage gate at 100% statements/branches/functions/lines (2575/1893/472/2480 across 1839 tests in 124 files).

patch.value: Extracted src/core/history/history-rewrite.ts with checkHistoryRewriteOwnership + verifyHistoryRewriteNoDrift; redact -16 LOC, repair -16 LOC, 12 new unit tests, 100% coverage gate green.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Merged 2026-05-26 via PR #74 (squash commit accde275). history-rewrite.ts helpers shipped; redact/repair deduped. 4 review rounds clean: Codex 'no major issues' x2; Gemini findings all addressed (filter-all-positionals, defensive metadata optional-chaining, empty-positional upstream filter, case-insensitive view normalization); CodeRabbit 'no actionable comments'.
